---
title: "Welcome"
---

Hello. Welcome to my personal website.

I was raised in Honduras and at the moment I am living in Germany. As of 07.2023 I am a doctoral researcher at the Cluster of Excellence, SimTech in Stuttgart. Soon I will be joining TU Dortmund and I will be working with [Dr. Paul Bürkner](https://paul-buerkner.github.io) in Computational Statistics. In general, I am interested in Bayesian Inference, Prior specification, Probabilistic Programming and High Dimensional Statistics.

Do not hesitate in contacting me if you ever want to work together or if you have doubts or comments about my work.
